summary: iter306 — Hani/Moataz isolation scenario verified. Ran test_hani_moataz_isolation.py + full regression on send-welcome/update_tenant/vault password suite. 23/23 tests passed. WA logo confirmed 56x56 physical pixels.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown huge (17k+ lines) — DeprecationWarning re: on_event startup/shutdown; recommend migrating to lifespan handlers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter306 confirmed: send_welcome_to_tenant_owner routes to ONLY the user whose email==tenant.owner_email (Hani/admin), never to another admin/manager (Moataz) in the same tenant. Message body contains Hani's vault password, not Moataz's. WA sent only to Hani's phone. Regression suite (password lifecycle, vault, isolation, tenant-admin edits, email match) all green. WA logo at /app/backend/static/branding/maestro-logo-wa.png verified 56x56.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification only. Prior iter305 verified email-match logic; iter306 added explicit two-admin (owner+manager) scenario per user's Hani/Moataz clarification and passed.
